tasks.goal: Build a current repository and product context bundle before making changes.
tasks.trigger: new AI session, context compaction, or uncertain repo state

tasks.goal: Implement requested changes with focused verification and no unresolved worktree drift.
tasks.trigger: user asks for implementation, fix, refactor, or extension

tasks.goal: Detect platform/module coupling, weak adapter boundaries, and handler overreach.
tasks.trigger: new module, new provider, refactor, or decoupling review

tasks.goal: Prove the repository can support production deployment for the selected site profile.
tasks.trigger: before go-live, provider change, domain change, or deploy pipeline change

tasks.goal: Keep long-lived repo health visible through objective checks.
tasks.trigger: periodic maintenance or user asks to maintain repository
